name: Brocoli Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions and celery in a large skillet until tender.
2. Mix Cheese Whiz with hot rice.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the soup, cooked broccoli, onion, and celery together.
4. Combine all ingredients in a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
5. Let set for one half hour.
6. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for one hour.
